title: Tenn Well Butchers String, 3Ply 100m Strong Cotton Kitchen Twine Food Safe Oven Cooking String for Meat Trussing Tying, Chicken Roasting and Sausage Making (Beige)
features: SAFE BAKERS TWINE - Made of cotton, this string is designed for cooking, safe and harmless for your family
BUTCHERS TWINE - This bakers string is perfect for trussing a turkey, chicken, or roast, and for other culinary tasks, strong enough for trussing and tying meat
MULTI-PURPOSE - This white cotton twine also works well on arts and crafts, book binding, decorating and gardening applications. Making candle wicks is also a good choose
SIZE of COOKING TWINE - 3ply, 0.04inches (1mm) thick, with 328 feet(100m), this thick kitchen string is long and strong enough for you to use in many occasions
WIDE APPLICATION - This cotton string is also perfect for christmas gift wrapping, packaging, crocheting, packing material and drawstring
description: Product Description 100m cotton butchers twine, safe cooking string for tying poultry, making sausage, DIY crafts and decoration. COTTON BUTCHERS TWINE Made of natural cotton, this butchers twine is safe and will not hurt the environment. No unraveling, no fraying, it handles easily and holds knots tightly PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Material: Cotton Twine Length: 328 Feet / 100m Twine Diameter: 0.04inch / 1mm Color: Beige Trussing & Tying Poultry Twine The food safe twine is perfect for trussing and tying up a turkey, chicken, roast and other culinary tasks Gift Wrapping String This butchers string can be used as ribbon on present or hanging festival gift tags, banners and pictures Craft and Decoration Twine It also can be used for crafts, DIY projects, drawstrings, gardening and household projects
